name: Catalyst Metals Limited
analysis: CYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.7200, stop A$4.4352, target A$6.6500 (0.72:1) — then trail it.
